title: Corpus Hermeticum IV: The Mixing Bowl
description: God sends a great mixing bowl of Nous (Mind) to earth. Those who bathe in it receive knowledge; those who don't remain ignorant.
introduction: God sends a great mixing bowl of Nous (Mind) to earth. Those who bathe in it receive knowledge; those who don't remain ignorant.

translation.text: God filled a great mixing bowl with Mind and sent it down, appointing a herald: 'Baptize yourself, you who can, in this bowl.'
